title: Google introduces Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and Flash Cyber
friendlyTitle: Google releases three faster Gemini models
summary: Google has released a new group of Gemini Flash models aimed at faster, more efficient agent workloads. The lineup includes 3.6 Flash for broad use, a lower-cost 3.5 Flash-Lite and a cybersecurity-focused model available through a more limited route.
friendlySummary: Google has released new Gemini Flash models for general AI work, lower-cost tasks and cybersecurity.
whyItMatters: Teams can choose more precisely between capability, speed, cost and specialist security work instead of sending every task to one frontier model. That can make high-volume assistants and agent workflows cheaper to operate, though access and benchmark fit still need checking.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Businesses can pick a model that better matches the job and budget instead of using the most expensive model for everything.
